_comment: Orthanc runtime config for Klinika. Values inside ${...} are substituted by Orthanc from the container environment.
Name: klinika-orthanc
_comment_tls: Modality-side TLS — required for ultrasound → Orthanc on production. Enabled when the container is started with the on-prem compose file that mounts the certs.
_comment_webhook: After every received instance, on-stored.lua POSTs the parent study id to Klinika's bridge endpoint. The bridge debounces and writes one dicom_studies row per study.
_comment_concurrency: Limit Orthanc's job concurrency on small mini-PCs — the ultrasound machine is rarely the bottleneck.
_comment_logging: Keep verbose logging off in production — DICOM payloads can pull PHI into operational logs. Klinika's audit log is the system of record for image access.
